name: Momentum
description: Continuation model that follows the 30 over 200 EMA bias after a fresh 2 ATR counter-spike and no repeat spike in the last 10 bars.

trigger: Long when the 30 EMA is above the 200 EMA, price prints a fresh downside spike, and there has not been another downside spike in the last 10 bars.
Short when the 30 EMA is below the 200 EMA, price prints a fresh upside spike, and there has not been another upside spike in the last 10 bars.

earlyExit: Long exit when the 30 EMA stays above the 200 EMA and price has already printed the upside spike that ends the move.
Short exit when the 30 EMA stays below the 200 EMA and price has already printed the downside spike that ends the move.

checks.label: The 30 EMA is above the 200 EMA
Price just printed a 2 ATR downside spike
No downside spike printed in the last 10 bars
The 30 EMA is below the 200 EMA
Price just printed a 2 ATR upside spike
No upside spike printed in the last 10 bars
The 30 EMA is still above the 200 EMA
Price has already printed the 2 ATR upside spike that ends the move
The 30 EMA is still below the 200 EMA
Price has already printed the 2 ATR downside spike that ends the move
